profile: Otherworld Assault (Spirit Summon / Dual DPS). She and her summoned [Holy Spirit] deal Magic + True DMG that scales hard with ATK and with [Disintegration] (DoT/debuff) stacks - Genesis IV adds True DMG = 20% ATK x Disintegration stacks, and her Feat/Garrote add HP-% True DMG. Wins via Final DMG, True DMG, ATK%, AoE, debuff-conditional damage and Damage-Share synergy. Does NOT crit, does NOT spam basic attacks, and brings no team heal - so crit, basic-attack-only, and ally-heal/support mirrors are dead.

ranking.name: Firmament
ranking.reason: Flat Final DMG +12%->30%, no condition. Multiplies every Magic and True DMG instance she and Holy Spirit deal; anima ceiling. Best generic DPS slot.

ranking.name: Horde-Assault
ranking.reason: Her Ultimate hits 4 random enemies and Garrote is AoE; this adds up to 400% ATK True DMG across AoE skills. Massive AoE True-DMG synergy with her wide-target kit.

ranking.name: Lucifer
ranking.reason: Triggers on targets with DMG-Over-Time - her [Disintegration] qualifies. 3* jumps to 4 triggers/turn + [Torment] (DoT amp). A->S at 3* where the multi-hit current-HP True DMG and DoT amplification land on her core debuff.

ranking.name: Wukong
ranking.reason: All attacks add 5%->20% ATK as True DMG, unconditional. She and the summon attack many times per turn (Feat, Ultimate hits 4, Garrote AoE), so this scales superbly with her multi-hit True-DMG kit.

ranking.name: Nuwa Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Her own themed mirror: Final DMG +5%->20% and, in Damage-Share state (her Genesis I keeps her in it), +10%->30% Final DMG plus Effect Resist; 3* adds debuff-block. Tailored to her exact win condition.

ranking.name: Ananke Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Final DMG +5%->20%, +15%->40% vs enemies in Damage Share/Transfer, and 3*+ adds current-HP True DMG. Premium Final-DMG + True-DMG package that fits her debuff-burst profile.

ranking.name: Ada
ranking.reason: +8%->20% ATK DMG vs enemies with any Debuff. She blankets targets in [Disintegration], so the condition is near-permanent. Reliable always-on DMG amp.

ranking.name: Wasteward
ranking.reason: Each attack/basic stacks Final DMG up to 18%->50%. With her and the summon attacking repeatedly per turn she ramps it fast; pure Final-DMG multiplier on a multi-hit kit.

ranking.name: Royal Awe
ranking.reason: Repeated hits on the same enemy stack DMG up to 42%->60%. Her Feat focuses the highest-ATK enemy and the summon piles on, so the stack builds; generic but big DMG%.

ranking.name: Throat-Slitting
ranking.reason: 20%->45% Final DMG that resets on kill. She clears multiple targets via AoE so kills keep it topped up; strong front-loaded Final DMG.

ranking.name: Nyx Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Passive/triggered AOE skills add current-HP True DMG. Her summon-driven AoE benefits; 3* raises to 2 triggers and a higher cap. Strong but ramp depends on AoE-trigger frequency, so A.

ranking.name: Mister
ranking.reason: ATK +2%->5%. Her entire kit scales off ATK (True DMG, Garrote, Disintegration bonus), so flat ATK% always converts to damage - small but clean.

ranking.name: Yin
ranking.reason: Flat Final DMG +2%->5%, no condition. Universally useful but small numbers; pure stat filler while building better Final-DMG mirrors.

ranking.name: Isabella
ranking.reason: Final DMG +4%->10%, +6%->15% vs [Shield] targets. Base Final DMG always applies; the shield bonus is situational. Fine filler.

ranking.name: Rose
ranking.reason: Final DMG ramp; 3* splits to 5% per Ultimate/Feat cast. She casts Feat + Ultimate often, so the skill-cast branch is decent - solid Final-DMG filler, not a standout.

ranking.name: Ling
ranking.reason: Skills add 40%->120% ATK True DMG, but only to [Infect] targets specifically - she applies Disintegration, not Infect, so the trigger is usually unmet despite the big True-DMG ceiling.

ranking.name: Michael
ranking.reason: Final DMG +3%->6% per buff on self, up to 15%->30%. She carries some self-buffs (Genesis/summon states) but not a buff-stacking engine, so uptime is partial.

ranking.name: Baleful Omen
ranking.reason: Final DMG +5%->15% plus [Lethal] anti-revive. The Final DMG is always useful; the control rider is mode-dependent. Decent anima filler.

ranking.name: Night Depths
ranking.reason: Stacks True DMG % as she loses HP; 3* adds a max-HP True-DMG burst. Her summon eats much of her damage (Genesis I), keeping her HP high, so stacks build slowly - usable filler.

ranking.name: Tinplate
ranking.reason: True DMG to attacker on being hit, scales off DEF. She has low DEF and isn't a tank that wants to be hit; off-profile reflect, minor value.

ranking.name: Kira
ranking.reason: Single-target ATK DMG +8%->20%. Boosts only single-target attacks; her Feat is single-target but Ultimate/Garrote are AoE, so partial coverage only.

ranking.name: Valendine
ranking.reason: Single-Attack DMG scaling with target HP lost. She is AoE/dual-DPS, not a single-target executioner, so most of her hits don't qualify.

ranking.name: Aurora
ranking.reason: DEF Ignore +5%->15%. Her primary damage is Magic/True DMG that already bypasses DEF, so DEF-ignore adds little; weak for her.

ranking.name: Luna
ranking.reason: Area-Attack DMG +10%->25% - relevant to her Ultimate/Garrote, but it boosts only the AoE hits and ignores her Feat/True-DMG riders. Modest partial synergy.

ranking.name: Lilith
ranking.reason: Single-Skill True DMG per debuff on target - but only on single-target skill attacks. Her main damage is AoE/summon-driven, so the once-per-turn single-target trigger underutilizes her.

ranking.name: Frostglow
ranking.reason: Flat Final DMG RED +12%->30%. Pure survivability; helps her stay alive to keep casting but contributes nothing to her damage output.

ranking.name: Titan Strength
ranking.reason: +ATK/DEF only while she carries a [Shield] - she has no self-shield source, so it rarely activates despite the ATK upside. Conditional dead weight unless paired with a shield mirror.

ranking.name: Jeanne
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED + heal in Damage-Share state. She is in Damage-Share-style states, so this gives real survivability, but it adds no offense - defensive filler only.

ranking.name: Hinata Inori
ranking.reason: Big Crit Rate + Final DMG, but triggers on ally death and the payload is crit-centric - she doesn't crit, so half the buff is wasted; the Final DMG portion is only conditional.

ranking.name: Gaia Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: HP% + AoE True DMG on a lethal hit. Defensive/tank-flavored; she avoids lethal hits (summon absorbs damage) so the trigger is rare for her.

ranking.name: Venus
ranking.reason: DMG-reduction support mirror with empty/placeholder effect text - only a survivability stat-stick for a DPS; minimal value.

ranking.name: Galos
ranking.reason: Flat DEF +2%->5%. She has very low DEF and her damage doesn't scale off it; near-worthless.

ranking.name: Frankenstein
ranking.reason: Flat HP +2%->5%. Tiny survivability stat with no synergy to her damage levers.

ranking.name: Zhiming
ranking.reason: Flat Final DMG RED +2%->5%. Tiny defensive stat; no offense for her.

ranking.name: Albert
ranking.reason: Flat HP +5%->15%. Survivability only; she scales off ATK/Final/True DMG, not HP, so this is dead weight offensively.

ranking.name: Van Helsing
ranking.reason: Ultimate-DMG-on-buildup that scales with Basic Attacks. She barely basic-attacks and isn't ult-centric, so the buildup never fills; anti-synergy.

ranking.name: Garvin
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED +5%->15%. Defensive-only; survivability filler with zero offensive synergy.

ranking.name: Uncle Ying
ranking.reason: Ultimate DMG +8%->20% - only her Ultimate benefits, none of her Feat/summon/True-DMG damage. Narrow and she isn't an Ultimate-burst hero.

ranking.name: Jacob
ranking.reason: Final DMG + Final DMG RED that ramp as HP drops. Her summon absorbs damage so she stays high-HP and rarely ramps; bruiser mirror off her profile.

ranking.name: Dracula
ranking.reason: HP% + Healing-Received ramp. Pure sustain stat-stick; she gains no offensive scaling and isn't a tank.

ranking.name: Alucard
ranking.reason: Pure Crit Rate/Crit DMG (+ on-crit dispel). She doesn't crit, so the entire mirror including the dispel rider is dead.

ranking.name: Dark Tide
ranking.reason: HP% + DMG when her HP exceeds the enemy's. The DMG rider is generic and small; mostly an HP stat-stick that doesn't engage her scaling levers.

ranking.name: Rock Elephant
ranking.reason: Caps big hits above an HP% threshold - a tank mitigation tool. No offense and off her squishy-summoner profile.

ranking.name: Flame Dawn
ranking.reason: Self-revive on first death. Minor insurance, but she already has Holy Spirit damage-sharing and Genesis resurrection of the summon; no damage value.

ranking.name: Eternal Stand
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED that ramps as she's attacked. Tank-oriented; the summon soaks her hits so she rarely stacks it, and it adds no damage.

ranking.name: Vivi
ranking.reason: Crit Rate +2%->5%. She doesn't crit; flat crit rate converts to nothing.

ranking.name: Aelia
ranking.reason: Crit DMG +2%->5%. Useless without crit, which she lacks entirely.

ranking.name: Lincoln
ranking.reason: Crit DMG taken reduction - an anti-crit defensive stat with no offense and no relevance to her kit.

ranking.name: Theresa
ranking.reason: Increases Heal output - she has no team heal to amplify; dead support stat.

ranking.name: Bathory
ranking.reason: Flat Effect Hit Rate +5%->15%. Marginally helps land Disintegration but adds no damage; a control-utility stat-stick far below her DPS options.

ranking.name: Raphael
ranking.reason: Flat Effect Resist Rate. Survivability-utility only; no damage and no kit synergy.

ranking.name: Elegy
ranking.reason: On-Crit healing-reduction debuff. Gated entirely behind landing crits, which she never does; zero uptime.

ranking.name: Heidi
ranking.reason: Boosts single-target heal skills - she has none; completely inert.

ranking.name: Sariel
ranking.reason: Chance to Infect attackers on being hit. Defensive control proc unrelated to her debuff (Disintegration) and offers no offense.

ranking.name: Orpheus
ranking.reason: Self lost-HP recovery. Minor sustain with no offense; the summon already handles her survivability better.

ranking.name: Arthur
ranking.reason: DMG vs Controlled enemies. She applies Disintegration, not hard control, so the condition is rarely met by her own kit; off-profile.

ranking.name: Azmodan
ranking.reason: Chance to Bleed attackers on being hit. Defensive Bleed proc; off-profile and applies a DoT type her kit doesn't use.

ranking.name: Sherry
ranking.reason: Extra [Bleed] stacks on applying Bleed. She applies Disintegration, not Bleed - trigger never met; dead.

ranking.name: Adele
ranking.reason: Basic-Attack DMG + Basic-Attack crit. She casts skills, doesn't spam basics, and doesn't crit - both clauses dead.

ranking.name: Ying Gou
ranking.reason: Extra [Infect] stacks on applying Infect. She doesn't apply Infect, so the mirror never triggers.

ranking.name: Renais
ranking.reason: Basic-Attack DMG stacking + on-kill bonus Basic Attack. Her damage is skills/summon True DMG, not basics, so the entire mirror including the famed 3* re-attack does nothing.

ranking.name: Mystic Bull
ranking.reason: Team Shield at battle start. Support utility - useful for a frontline, irrelevant to her personal DPS output.

ranking.name: Scale-Splitting
ranking.reason: Basic-Attack True DMG + on-Crit bonus. Both triggers (basic attacks, crit) are absent from her kit; True-DMG payload never fires for her.

ranking.name: Warding Blessing
ranking.reason: Grants allies Spirit Shield on her death. Support/death effect; no value to her own damage or survival while alive.

ranking.name: Alluring Gaze
ranking.reason: Effect Resist Rate stacking. Pure anti-CC utility; contributes nothing to her offense.

ranking.name: Enchantress
ranking.reason: Effect-Hit + [Fox Fire] control/DoT stack. Control-archetype mirror; the small Effect-Hit helps land debuffs but the payload doesn't scale her ATK/True-DMG burst.

ranking.name: Elbera‘s Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Effect Resist + small heal on buff expiry. Defensive support mirror; no offensive scaling for a DPS.

ranking.name: Daisy
ranking.reason: Final DMG base is fine but the payload is [Hunt] crit-rate/crit-DMG stacks - wasted on a non-crit hero; net far below dedicated Final-DMG mirrors.

ranking.name: Mars Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Triggers only on Feat Skill CRIT hits. She doesn't crit, so the True-DMG and Spirit-Armor effects never fire - fully dead despite the True-DMG theme.
